# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-061](task-0128): Provider Data Masking Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data masking rules.

## Scope

- Masking rules
- Application
- Exceptions

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Apply masking
3. Handle exceptions

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Masking applied
3. Exceptions handled
